pulledQuote: I make things because I like understanding how they work.

bio.personal: TODO(siladityaa) — a couple of paragraphs in your own voice. What keeps you curious, what you collect, the tools you reach for when nobody is watching. Think of it as the paragraph you'd leave if the portfolio had a colophon.
bio.professional: Senior Product Designer at Meta Reality Labs in Los Angeles, building wearables and the ambient AI experiences around them. Previously shipped Ray-Ban Stories and the second-generation Ray-Ban Meta Smart Glasses. Concurrently Adjunct Instructor at ArtCenter College of Design, where I graduated with Honors in 2021 and now teach Interactive Prototyping. Recognised by the International Design Awards, Muse Design Awards, and Adobe Design Achievement Awards.
